calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Olimpia Rodriguez-Rodriguez mother of minors present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1. from Henry Roberto Arroyo to Henry Arroyo Rodriguez. Minor 2. Karen Ruby Arroyo to Karen Ruby Arroyo Rodriguez. Minor 3. Esmeralda Mancilla to Esmeralda Mancilla Rodriguez.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
